description_long: This bungalow features a long, rectangular structure with a low-pitched, ridged roof in a muted mauve color. The front facade is visually dynamic, with geometric patterns in black and mauve, and a central entrance accessed by a short staircase. Windows are arranged in vertical and diagonal groupings, primarily on the front and one side, with blue-tinted glass panels that contrast with the darker wall sections. The rear of the bungalow is simpler, with horizontal striping and minimal window openings, while the sides are mostly solid with a few window placements. The building sits low to the ground, typical of bungalow architecture, and lacks any visible porch or veranda. The overall design suggests a modern, geometric interpretation of the classic bungalow form.
description: A modern, rectangular bungalow with a mauve ridged roof, geometric black and mauve facade, and blue-tinted windows arranged in striking patterns. The structure is low and elongated, with a central entrance and minimal rear detailing.
description_view_0: Front view shows the main entrance with a staircase, bold geometric facade patterns, and grouped blue-tinted windows.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the elongated roof and mostly solid wall with minimal window openings.
description_view_2: Rear view displays a simple, horizontally striped wall with no visible entrance and very few windows.
description_view_3: Opposite side view highlights a single large window and the continuation of the roof's overhang.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped front and side windows
